decision_boundary: adrs decides accepted rules; governance CI executes Nix checks using GitHub-sourced ADR input
decision: Use GitHub Actions on ubuntu-latest with Nix installed by the workflow. Checkout governance and adrs from GitHub. Pass the checked-out ADR tree to Nix as adrsRecords. Run flake show, default help, named help, explicit bootstrap build, and flake check.
status_note: proposal PR should be merged only after CI run is observed
